original_image_tags: A scanned, aged, off-white page showing the reverse side of a typed document. The paper has two hole-punch marks at the top. The typed text from the front side of the page is visible as a faint, reversed mirror image. At the bottom left, there is a clear, upright, blue ink stamp reading "RECEIVED P 26 2:58 PM INTERNAL SECURITY F. B. I. SEPT 26 1957". On the bottom right, there is some faint, upright, handwritten pencil notation.
Transcription of the reversed, faint typed text from the document's front side, read as a mirror image:

elements.description: Blue 'RECEIVED' stamp with text: 'P 26 2 58 PM INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I.' and two punch holes at the top of the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual elements: a blue RECEIVED stamp and two punch holes, with Description A adding extra detail about the stamp text and other features that Description B omits but does not contradict.
